items.example: Claire and I didn't take to each other at first.
I got on well with her best friend from the start.
I suppose I came between them and their friendship.
Over time, we warmed to each other and became really close.
I hung around with her all the time at school.
We only ever fell out once over something really silly.
We made up after just a day of not talking to each other.
Unfortunately, life took us in different directions and we drifted apart.
She stops by my flat if she's passing.
We bump into each other in the supermarket sometimes.
